Here's a guide to help you create viral-worthy clips: ✨ Focus on the sacred spot: This place hits different. Keep your shots smooth and focused to convey reverence and draw viewers in instantly. 🎥 Viral clips often use slow pans over the architecture and lighting. Original post

bsky.name: Guardian US
bsky.text:
"A government that conceals its identity cannot demand perfect recognition from frightened civilians," writes @jamilsmith.bsky.social.

"ICE mistook Lorenzo Salgado Araujo for another man. He was expected to identify ICE instantly. Only one side was allowed to make an error."
bsky.ko: "정체를 숨기는 정부가 겁에 질린 시민들에게 완벽하게 알아보라고 요구할 수는 없다"고 @jamilsmith.bsky.social는 쓴다.  "ICE는 로렌조 살가도 아라우호를 다른 사람으로 오인했다. 그런데 그는 ICE를 즉각 알아봤어야 했다. 실수가 허용된 건 오직 한쪽뿐이었다."

bsky.name: George Conway ⚖️🇺🇸
bsky.text: @ejeancarroll.bsky.social: "I don't understand how people can be afraid of a fat elderly man who wears apricot makeup, his hair done up like Tippi Hedren in The Birds and sits in a court room and moans and groans and complains”
bsky.ko: @ejeancarroll.bsky.social: "살구색 화장을 하고, 머리는 영화 〈새〉의 티피 헤드런처럼 부풀리고, 법정에 앉아 끙끙대고 투덜대며 불평이나 늘어놓는 뚱뚱한 늙은 남자를 어떻게 무서워할 수 있는지 이해가 안 돼요."
